content.en:
After purchasing the information, Ye Tian knew what the superdimensional Dao species represented.

"To become a super-dimensional realm, you must condense the super-dimensional Dao species, and the extra-dimensional Dao species is to transform the eternal Dao species step by step by using the power of the super-dimensional, and after condensing the super-dimensional Dao species, and then construct the super-dimensional Dao body, you can truly advance to the super-dimensional realm. "

Ye Tian completely understood.

In short, thoroughly mastering the power of the super-dimensional is only the first step, and after mastering it, condensing the super-dimensional Dao species and constructing the super-dimensional Dao body, then the super-dimensional realm is achieved.

As for the cultivation at the level of the pinnacle realm god realm, it is not necessarily how many eternal realm spirits can be condensed, in short, as long as the twelve eternal realm spirits are condensed, they can start to impact the transcendent realm.

But obviously, the twelve Eternal Realm Spirits are only the minimum standard, and if there is potential, it is naturally better to condense more Eternal Realm Spirits.

However, if the extradimensional Dao species are condensed, there is no way to condense the eternal realm spirits, and this order must be known.

Otherwise, once the superdimensional Dao species is condensed, and you want more Eternal Realm Spirits, it will be too late to regret it.

"It seems that in the future, we must buy the super-dimensional Dao inheritance, but the super-dimensional Dao seed is too precious, I don't know if those supreme forces have exchanged the super-dimensional Dao inheritance, even if they do, it is estimated that they are only buying ordinary super-dimensional Dao inheritance, the top super-dimensional Dao inheritance, they may not be willing to buy~ !"

Ye Tian thought so.

Moreover, none of the peak realm gods among those supreme forces has completely controlled the power of the super-dimensional, and where is the qualification to condense the super-dimensional Dao species, they will only be purchased there.

Therefore, without truly mastering the power of the super-dimensional, it is undoubtedly a waste of time to purchase the super-dimensional Dao inheritance.

Originally, Ye Tian still had the idea of buying a super-dimensional Dao inheritance, but now that he thinks about it, forget it.

After all, he was still too far away from condensing the superdimensional Dao species, and there was no need to spend all his net worth to buy it.

For now, it's best to buy the inheritance and treasures that suit you as much as possible.

"Let's buy a treasure that is suitable for life-saving first!"

Ye Tian decided.

It's not that he's worried about his safety, he has copied a lot of bodies, even if he is targeted by the supreme force Taihao Tianchao Palace, it is impossible to be killed and all of his copied bodies.

However, once he was defeated, the human race would not be able to stop the Taihao Heavenly Palace.

Therefore, he had to let Taihao Tianchao Palace know that they could not kill him, and it was undoubtedly the best choice to buy life-saving items on the Galanbo ship.

Soon, he kept looking for something suitable for his life.

Eventually, he found a suitable place to save his life in an area of the Garanbol ship.

【Super Dimensional Secret Treasure - Garanbao Clothes】

This should be a kind of super dimensional secret treasure refined by the force where the Jialanbao ship is located, any super dimensional secret treasure is refined, but if you want to refine the super dimensional secret treasure you want, you must have a corresponding forging method.

And the role of the Garan Baoyi is very great, it not only has an extremely powerful defensive effect, but also can inspire a Garan light, instantly turning into a Garan light and escaping, its speed has reached the level of comparable to a half-step extradimensional realm.

The value of such a life-saving thing is naturally expensive.

【100,000 Galanbao Coins】

It can be said that many peak realm gods can't get together so many Garanbao coins.

But Ye Tian can make it up.

As for whether it's worth buying, it's certainly worth it.

Therefore, Ye Tian quickly took out all kinds of extra-dimensional resources and exchanged them at the place where the Jialanbao Ship exchanged for Jialanbao Coins, and after a while, he collected 100,000 Jialanbao Coins, and then bargained with the Peak Realm God of the Jialanbao Ship who sold the Garlanbao clothes here.

This action naturally attracted a lot of peak realm gods, after all, the treasures worth 100,000 gala blue treasure coins, almost no peak realm god could afford to buy, and only the supreme forces could afford it in the name of power, but they rarely bought such treasures.

......

"It's the Ye Heavenly Realm God, he's buying the Garlan Treasure Clothes?"

The god of the Sumeru realm was shocked.

At this moment, he truly affirmed his previous guess, Ye Tian must have taken away all the resources of that super dimensional treasure land, otherwise he would definitely not be able to make up 100,000 garments!

The Garan Treasure Suit, this kind of super dimensional secret treasure is worth 100,000 Galan Treasure Coins, and his Boundless Sailing Ship is actually worth two or three thousand Galan Treasure Coins.

Even he couldn't afford to buy a garment.

Soon, Ye Tian returned a few hundred pieces of Garanbao coins and successfully purchased the Garanbao clothes.

And the Sumeru Realm God and the other peak realm gods of the Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace frowned slightly when they saw this.

They knew very well that if Ye Tian had the Garlan Treasure Clothes, they would not be able to help Ye Tian at all, and once they attacked and killed him, they would offend Ye Tian instead.

In case Ye Tiantian became strong in the future, it would be a disaster for Taihao Tianchao Palace.

A realm god who can't be killed doesn't need to be killed.

Unless you find a good time in the future, it will be the best opportunity to attack Ye Tian. []

And after Ye Tian bought the Garan Treasure Clothes, he quickly took a fancy to another thing - the Super Dimensional Secret Treasure Scroll.

This Atlas of the Secret Treasure records a total of more than a dozen refining methods of the Secret Treasure of the Dimension, and its value is quite good, enough to be the foundation of a supreme force.

Any Extra-Dimensional Secret Treasure is extremely important to the Supreme Forces, even if it is an ordinary Ultra-Dimensional Secret Treasure, it is worth buying.

Moreover, Ye Tian was able to obtain a lot of extra-dimensional materials from the Death Void, and he needed the method of refining the super-dimensional secret treasure.

So, he bought this super secret treasure scroll.

Of course, the value of this Super Secret Treasure Scroll is not low, and it cost Ye Tian more than 60,000 Mega Blue Treasure Coins.

Then, Ye Tian spent a lot of Garlan Treasure Coins to buy a resource that was extremely suitable for refining the Eternal Dao Seed.

Although there are many resources in the Death Void that can help refine the Eternal Dao Seed, this area does not have such resources, and the Garanbao Ship found them from other areas.

This extradimensional resource is called Galanbao liquid.

Maybe it wasn't called that in the past, but now it's called Gavalan.

One drop of Galanbol liquid was worth three hundred Galanbol coins, and Ye Tian bought three hundred drops of Galanbol liquid in one go, costing a full ninety thousand Galanbol coins.

This generosity attracted a lot of peak realm gods, and they all set their eyes on Ye Tian one by one, but they also knew that Ye Tian had a garn treasure robe, and even after going out, he would be able to save his life, so he quickly extinguished the idea of making a move on Ye Tian.
